info.title: Prometheus Metrics Fetcher
info.description: Fetches performance metrics from Prometheus for EKS workloads

get.description: Retrieves Kubernetes and application metrics from Prometheus. Use when checking pod CPU usage, memory usage, restarts, or deployment health for the 3-tier EKS application.

parameters.name: metric_name
parameters.description: Metric name to query. Supported values: pod_cpu_utilization, pod_memory_utilization, pod_restarts, deployment_replicas_available, deployment_replicas_unavailable

parameters.name: hours_back
parameters.description: How many hours of data to analyze.
